settingsProfile.title: Account
settingsProfile.description: Change the details of your profile here.
settingsProfile.allowImpersonationDescription: Enable this option to allow Dokploy Cloud administrators to temporarily access your account for troubleshooting and support purposes. This helps them quickly identify and resolve any issues you may encounter.
settingsProfile.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
settingsProfile.imageTooLarge: Image size must be less than 2MB

settingsUsers.title: Users
settingsUsers.description: Add your users to your Dokploy account.
settingsUsers.emptyState: Invite users to your Dokploy account
settingsUsers.customRolesWarning: You have {count, plural, one {1 user} other {{count} users}} assigned to custom roles. Custom roles will not work without a valid Enterprise license. Please activate your license or change these users to a free role (Admin or Member).
settingsUsers.deleteUserDescription: Are you sure you want to delete this user?
settingsUsers.unlinkUserDescription: Are you sure you want to unlink this user?

settingsServers.title: Servers
settingsServers.description: Add servers to deploy your applications remotely.
settingsServers.noSshKeysState: No SSH Keys found. Add a SSH Key to start adding servers.
settingsServers.emptyState: Start adding servers to deploy your applications remotely.
settingsServers.serverDeactivated: This server is deactivated due to lack of payment. Please pay your invoice to reactivate it. If you think this is an error, please contact support.
settingsServers.setupServerDesc: Configure and initialize your server with Docker, Traefik, and other essential services
settingsServers.deleteServerDesc: This will delete the server and all associated data
settingsServers.cannotDeleteServer: You can not delete this server because it has active services.
settingsServers.activeServicesWarning: You have active services associated with this server, please delete them first.

settingsNotifications.title: Notifications
settingsNotifications.description: Add your providers to receive notifications, like Discord, Slack, Telegram, Teams, Email, Resend, Lark.
settingsNotifications.emptyState: To send notifications it is required to set at least 1 provider.
settingsNotifications.deleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete this notification?

settingsCertificates.title: Certificates
settingsCertificates.description: Create certificates in the Traefik directory
settingsCertificates.warningAlert: Certificates are created in the Traefik directory. Traefik uses these certificates to secure your applications. Using invalid certificates can break your Traefik instance, preventing access to your applications.
settingsCertificates.emptyState: You don't have any certificates created
settingsCertificates.deleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete this certificate?

settingsDestinations.title: S3 Destinations
settingsDestinations.description: Add your providers like AWS S3, Cloudflare R2, Wasabi, DigitalOcean Spaces etc.
settingsDestinations.emptyState: To create a backup it is required to set at least 1 provider.
settingsDestinations.deleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete this destination?

settingsSshKeys.title: SSH Keys
settingsSshKeys.description: Create and manage SSH Keys, you can use them to access your servers, git private repositories, and more.
settingsSshKeys.emptyState: You don't have any SSH keys
settingsSshKeys.deleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete this SSH Key?

settingsGitProviders.title: Git Providers
settingsGitProviders.description: Connect your Git provider for authentication.
settingsGitProviders.deleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete this Git Provider?

settingsTags.title: Tags
settingsTags.description: Create and manage tags to organize your projects
settingsTags.emptyState: No tags yet. Create your first tag to start organizing projects.

settingsAi.title: AI Settings
settingsAi.emptyState: You don't have any AI configurations
settingsAi.deleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete this AI?

settingsRegistry.title: Docker Registry
settingsRegistry.emptyState: You don't have any registry configurations
settingsRegistry.deleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete this registry configuration?

settingsWebServer.title: Web Server
settingsWebServer.description: Reload or clean the web server.

settingsWebDomain.title: Server Domain
settingsWebDomain.description: Add a domain to your server application.
settingsWebDomain.urlChangeWarningDesc: If you change the Dokploy Server URL make sure to update your Github Apps to keep the auto-deploy working and preview deployments working.

settingsCluster.title: Cluster
settingsCluster.tableCaption: A list of your managers / workers.
settingsCluster.deleteNodeDescription: Are you sure you want to delete this node from the cluster?
settingsCluster.noRegistryTitle: To add nodes to your cluster, you need to configure at least one registry.
settingsCluster.noRegistryTooltip: Nodes need a registry to pull images from.
settingsCluster.noRegistryDockerHub: Docker Registry: Use custom registries like Docker Hub, DigitalOcean Registry, etc.

settingsApiKeys.title: API/CLI Keys
settingsApiKeys.description: Generate and manage API keys to access the API/CLI
settingsApiKeys.deleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete this API key? This action cannot be undone.
